entries.title: COMMENTARY ON REVELATION on revelation 2:3
entries.excerpt: And thou hast patience, and hast endured for my name, and hast not fainted. As this is obvious, let us pass over it.

entries.title: Commentary on Revelation on revelation 2:3
entries.excerpt: He says, and you have patience and have endured for my name's sake, and have not grown fatigued, and you have done well indeed; for it is said, "Bear one another's burdens, and so fulfill the law of God." (Gal. 6:2)
